product.name: AutoStream
product.description: A SaaS product that provides automated video editing tools for content creators.

policies.refund_policy: No refunds after 7 days of subscription start.
policies.support_policy: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users get standard email support.
policies.cancellation: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing period.
